title: MAP effectiveness review from the recorded 2026-07-02 process
description: Operator #18292: review MAP system effectiveness using the recorded process. Produce an evidence-based report from durable records (events.jsonl, task/review/release artifacts, git history, watcher state): throughput and cycle times for TASK-086..098, review-gate effectiveness (rework rounds and what each caught), incident log and recovery quality (map.db clobber, reseed fallout, watcher liveness, stale servers, canonical-repo staleness), coordination quality (races, duplicate cards, lock usage, handoffs), operator-intervention count vs delegation, recurring failure patterns (SYN-0001), and concrete recommendations. Peer input from lema/limo attributed. Deliverable: MAP_System/artifacts/reviews/map-effectiveness-review-2026-07-02.md.
acceptance_criteria: Every claim in the report cites a durable record (event, artifact, commit, or task id)
Covers wins AND weaknesses with equal rigor; each weakness has a concrete recommendation
Quantified: task cycle times, rework rounds, review catch list, incident count/recovery times
Peer perspectives from lema and limo included and attributed
